channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Ruet-e-Hilal Committee to Convene in Karachi for Zil Hajj Moon Sighting
item.description: The Central Ruet-e-Hilal Committee of Pakistan is scheduled to meet tomorrow, Sunday, in Karachi to observe the crescent moon of Zil Hajj, according to the Ministry of Religious Affairs and Interfaith...

item.title: Tony Elumelu Calls for Infrastructure Investment and Private Sector Partnership at Africa Forward Summit
item.description: At the 2026 Africa Forward Summit wey French President Emmanuel Macron and Kenyan President William Ruto convene, Tony Elumelu, the founder of Heirs Holdings, deliver strong message to world leaders a...

item.title: Heinz Meixner's Ingenious 1963 Escape from East Berlin with Fiancée and Her Mother
item.description: In 1963, Heinz Meixner, an Austrian lathe operator, executed a daring escape from East Berlin to the West with his fiancée, Margarete Thurau, and her mother. After falling in love while working in Eas...

item.title: VP Sara calls on PMA 2026 graduates to serve the nation with integrity and courage
item.description: Vice President Sara Duterte addressed the 2026 graduates of the Philippine Military Academy (PMA) on Saturday, urging them to uphold the nation's pride, honor, and dignity while remaining steadfast ag...

item.title: Lewandowski to Depart Barcelona After Four Successful Seasons
item.description: Veteran Polish striker Robert Lewandowski don announce say him go leave Barcelona this summer when him contract finish. The 37-year-old forward join Barca in 2022 from Bayern Munich and him don score ...

item.title: Trump Responds to NY Governor Hochul Over Railroad Strike, Offers Guidance and Endorses GOP Candidate
item.description: On May 16, 2026, President Donald Trump publicly criticized New York Governor Kathy Hochul following her comments blaming his administration for a Long Island Rail Road strike. Hochul claimed that the...

item.title: Mpumalanga learners suspended pending investigation into school bullying incident
item.description: The Mpumalanga Department of Education has confirmed that three learners at Keledi Secondary School in Achornhoek, Bushbuckridge, will face disciplinary action following an alleged bullying incident c...

item.title: Architectural practice Durbach Block Jaggers awarded Australian Institute of Architects Gold Medal
item.description: Neil Durbach, Camilla Block and David Jaggers, founders of Sydney-based architectural practice DBJ, have been awarded the Australian Institute of Architects Gold Medal, the highest honour in Australia...

item.title: Uncertainty Surrounds the Details of the Liberals’ Fiscal Plan
item.description: The recent editorial from The Globe and Mail highlights the uncertainty surrounding the Liberal government's fiscal plan, likening it to the thought experiment of Schrodinger’s Cat, where outcomes rem...

item.title: Majority of Tanzanian youth still lack practical skills, lawmakers say
item.description: During recent discussions in the Tanzanian Parliament, officials highlighted a worrying trend that over 72 percent of the country's youth remain low-skilled. This lack of adequate skills among young p...

item.title: APC clarifies all registered members fit vote without showing dues payment
item.description: The All Progressives Congress (APC) don make am clear say all registered party members no need show proof of membership dues before dem fit vote for the ongoing primary elections. This clarification c...

item.title: Senate rocked by security crisis and intense political turmoil
item.description: The Philippine Senate experienced an unprecedented week marked by a tense mix of political unrest and security incidents. Allegations of a potential coup circulated amid reports of gunfire near the Se...

item.title: Mother warns of lymphangitis after minor arm scrape in son leads to hospitalisation
item.description: Samantha Silver, a London-based mother and content creator, shared her family’s harrowing experience after her 10-year-old son, Leo, developed a serious infection from a minor scrape sustained while p...

item.title: Chuck Norris Passes Away at 86; Legendary Fight with Bruce Lee in The Way of the Dragon Remembered
item.description: Chuck Norris, the iconic actor and martial artist, passed away peacefully on March 19, 2026, at the age of 86, following a sudden medical emergency on the island of Kauai, Hawaii. Just days prior, Nor...

item.title: Yvonne Craig: A Look at Her Career and Iconic Moments in the 1960s
item.description: Yvonne Craig was a talented ballerina who transitioned into acting and modeling, gaining fame in the early 1960s. She is widely remembered for her role as the green-skinned Orion slave girl Marta in S...

item.title: Sterling Financial Holdings Reports Strong Profit Growth and Assets Exceed ₦4 Trillion in Early 2026
item.description: Sterling Financial Holdings Company Plc don release dem audited results for 2025 and unaudited results for Q1 2026, showing solid growth and better capital strength. For 2025, their Gross Earnings jum...

item.title: Uganda approves Starlink to operate satellite internet in the country
item.description: Uganda imepiga hatua kubwa ya kielektroniki kwa kumruhusu Elon Musk na kampuni yake ya Starlink kuanza kutoa huduma za internet kupitia satelaiti hapa nchini. Rais Yoweri Museveni ametangaza kupitia m...

item.title: HEC introduces uniform admission policy for MS, MPhil, and PhD programmes
item.description: The Higher Education Commission (HEC) of Pakistan has rolled out a revised policy for admissions in graduate programmes across the country. Under this new framework, all universities—public and privat...

item.title: Canada pilots program allowing transgender refugees to arrive with their preferred identity
item.description: The Canadian government is piloting a program that enables transgender refugees to change their gender and name immediately upon arrival, bypassing the usual administrative hurdles. Managed by Immigra...

item.title: Swiss Authorities to Release Secret Files on Josef Mengele Following Historians' Claims
item.description: Switzerland's intelligence service is set to release previously classified files concerning the notorious Nazi war criminal, Josef Mengele, often referred to as the 'Angel of Death' at Auschwitz. Meng...
